title: Meta’s AI is deleting accounts, and the only way to appeal is more AI
summary: Camille Hanson woke one night in March to a notification: Meta had flagged her Facebook and Instagram accounts for deletion. The five accounts the Times flagged, he noted, were all banned by Meta’s older tools.
caption: output/2026-07-22/meta-s-ai-is-deleting-accounts-and-the-only-way-to-appeal-is-more-ai.txt
